author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add a license/attribution manifest for downloaded models**

The model-discovery section encourages API-driven search/download from Thingiverse and unofficial feeds, but it never adds the ingestion rule that records source URL, author, and license beside each imported STL/3MF. For any public release/gallery/remix, missing attribution is a real compliance trap with CC-licensed 3D models; add a `models/ATTRIBUTION.md` or SPDX/REUSE-style metadata check ([Creative Commons on 3D attribution](https://creativecommons.org/2016/04/19/attribute-3d-printed-objects/), [REUSE tool](https://reuse.software/faq/)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
